data.title: Vertical Aerospace Unfairly Undervalued, Says Bullish Analyst
data.description: Analyst initiates coverage on Vertical Aerospace Ltd. with Buy rating and $15 price forecast. Company's progress and partnerships position it well in eVTOL market.

data.title: Chemomab Therapeutics' Touts Positive Data From Experimental Drug For Chronic Liver Disease
data.description: Chemomab's OLE study of nebokitug in PSC patients confirmed safety and showed improvements in liver stiffness, fibrosis biomarkers, and cholestasis markers.

data.title: Japan Approves BridgeBio Pharma-AstraZeneca Partnered Rare Heart Disease Drug
data.description: BridgeBio's acoramidis wins Japan's approval for ATTR-CM. Phase 3 data show a 42% reduction in key heart-related events. AstraZeneca's Alexion to market it.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Sees More Upside In Real Estate Data As February Volumes Surge And Revisions Trend Higher
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst reports strong growth in US real estate market in February, with increases in transaction volumes for office and retail sectors. Additional revisions are expected in March.

data.title: BlackRock Unveils New iShares iBonds ETFs For Fixed-Income Investors
data.description: BlackRock has launched two new target maturity ETFs, IBCA and IBIL, which blend features of bonds with stock-like trading for consistent returns.
